'''Lee Harland''' (born 4 September 1973) is an English former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s. He played at representative level for [[England national rugby league team|England]], [[Yorkshire rugby league team|Yorkshire]], Great Britain U21 and at club level for [[Leeds Rhinos|Leeds]], [[Halifax R.L.F.C.|Halifax]], [[Castleford Tigers]], [[Doncaster R.L.F.C.|Doncaster]] and [[Batley Bulldogs]], as a {{rlp|sr}}, or {{rlp|lf}}.<ref name="Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org"/>

==Playing career==
===Club career===
In February 1995, Harland was transferred from [[Halifax R.L.F.C.|Halifax]] to [[Castleford Tigers]] in exchange for [[Martin Ketteridge]].<ref>{{cite web |title=Fox gesture reported by angry fans |url=https://www.independent.co.uk/sport/fox-gesture-reported-by-angry-fans-1573742.html |website=The Independent |access-date=23 July 2025 |date=18 February 1995}}</ref>

===Representative honours===
Harland won caps [[Great Britain national rugby league team|Great Britain under-21]]'s against New Zealand and France.

Harland won two [[cap (sport)|cap]]s for [[England national rugby league team|England]] while at Castleford Tigers in 1999 against France.

Harland won [[cap (sport)|cap]]s for [[Yorkshire rugby league team|Yorkshire]] while at Castleford Tigers as a [[Rugby league positions#Substitutes|substitute]] in the 18-22 defeat by Lancashire at [[Wigan Warriors]]' stadium on 14 June 2002, and at {{rlp|sr}} in the 56-6 victory over Lancashire at [[Bradford Bulls]]' stadium on 2 July 2003.<ref name="Statistics at thecastlefordtigers.co.uk">{{cite web|url=http://www.thecastlefordtigers.co.uk/playerprofile.php?pid=23|title=Statistics at thecastlefordtigers.co.uk|publisher=thecastlefordtigers.co.uk |date=31 December 2013|accessdate=1 January 2014|url-status=dead|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20120227102751/http://www.thecastlefordtigers.co.uk/playerprofile.php?pid=23|archivedate=27 February 2012}}</ref>
